evals.prompt: Implement Cypress tests for user CRUD per task-020-e2e-users.md data-testid contract.
evals.expected_output: Agent discovery first, creates shared commands then device specs under cypress/e2e/device/, no DOM in specs.

evals.prompt: Refactor login spec — DOM selectors duplicated across desktop and mobile files.
evals.expected_output: Agent extracts shared login commands, specs call commands only.

evals.prompt: Add staff route RBAC test — direct URL visit without permission must not show CRUD.
evals.expected_output: Agent cy.visit protected route, asserts redirect/403, uses testids from contract.
